description_long: This object is a modern rifle with a streamlined, angular body and a prominent barrel extending from the front. The main receiver appears robust, with a stock at the rear for shoulder support and a pistol grip for handling. The magazine is positioned below the receiver, likely detachable, and the rifle features a flat top rail, possibly for mounting optics or sights. The barrel is relatively slender and extends straight from the receiver, with no visible muzzle device attached. The overall finish is matte and dark, suggesting a utilitarian, tactical design suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a matte dark finish, featuring a straight barrel, detachable magazine, and ergonomic stock.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from above, showing its slim profile and the full length of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the magazine, pistol grip, and the straight alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel barely visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the magazine, grip, and the overall length of the rifle.
